description_long: This object is a compact, handheld hair dryer with a cylindrical main body and a slightly tapered nozzle at one end. The main body is predominantly white, while the nozzle and rear intake grill are gray, providing a two-tone appearance. The handle is ergonomically angled and seamlessly attached to the underside of the main body, designed for comfortable grip. The rear of the device features a circular intake grill with a radial vent pattern, allowing air to be drawn in efficiently. The nozzle is wide and integrated, with a subtle hexagonal opening that directs airflow. No visible buttons, switches, or power cord are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A compact, white and gray handheld hair dryer with an angled handle, circular intake grill, and wide integrated nozzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical white body, angled handle, and gray nozzle.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the circular intake grill with a radial vent pattern and the handle below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same cylindrical body and handle, with the gray nozzle visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the wide, hexagonal gray nozzle opening and the handle beneath.
attribute_nozzle_design: The nozzle is wide, integrated, and slightly hexagonal in shape, designed to direct airflow in a broad stream. It appears to be a fixed, non-removable part of the main body.
attribute_air_intake_grill_pattern: The air intake grill features a circular pattern with evenly spaced radial slats radiating from the center.
attribute_handle_orientation: The handle is angled downward from the main body, forming an ergonomic grip.
